channel.title: News on Gordon Lab
channel.description: Recent content in News on Gordon Lab

item.title: Gordon Lab opening at Rutgers University
item.description: We are excited to announce the Gordon Lab will open in the Department of Psychology at Rutgers University in Fall 2026. We are actively recruiting graduate students, postdocs, and research technicians.

item.title: NIDA K99/R00 award to support lab research
item.description: Adam Gordon-Fennell was awarded a NIDA K99/R00 Pathway to Independence Award (K99DA059612) to study LHA and dopamine circuit mechanisms of positive and negative reinforcement.

item.title: OHRBETS platform paper published in eLife
item.description: Our paper describing OHRBETS — an open-source platform for head-fixed operant and consummatory behavior — is published in eLife with an ’exceptional’ eLife assessment.
